title: The Faridabad Development Corporation Act, 1956
full_text: The Faridabad Development Corporation Act, 1956 फरीदाबाद विकास निगम अधिनियम, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195690 Act Number: 90 Enactment Date: 1956-12-28 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Faridabad Development Corporation Act, 1956 Hindi Title: फरीदाबाद विकास निगम अधिनियम, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment and regulation of a trading Corporation for the purpose of carrying on and promoting trade and industry in the town of Faridabad, assisting in the rehabilitation of displaced persons settled therein and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 28-12-1956 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Faridabad Development Corporation Act, 1956 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II ESTABLISHMENT OF THE CORPORATION CHAPTER III POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE CORPORATION CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Incorporation. Section 4. Constitution of the Corporation. Section 5. Term and conditions of service of member. Section 6. Disqualification for being appointed, or for continuing as, member of the Corporation. Section 7. Temporary absence of any member. Section 8. Vacancies amongst members or defect in the constitution not to invalidate acts or proceedings of the Corporation. Section 9. Committees of the Corporation. Section 10. Meetings of the Corporation. Section 11. Authentication of orders and other instruments of the Corporation. Section 12. Appointment of Administrator and other officer of the Corporation. Section 13. General duty of the Corporation. Section 14. Powers of the Corporation. Section 15. Capital of the Corporation. Section 16. Grants and loans to the Corporation. Section 17. Vesting of property in the Corporation. Section 18. Repayment of capital and loan with interest. Section 19. Corporation to have rights and liabilities of the Central Government in certain cases. Section 20. Fund of the Corporation. Section 21. Provision for depreciation and reserve and other funds. Section 22. Power of the Corporation to spend. Section 23. Budget. Section 24. Annual report. Section 25. Accounts and audit. Section 26. Amount due to the Corporation to be first charge. Section 27. Direction. Section 28. Returns and reports. Section 29. Mode of recovery of moneys due to the Corporation. Section 30. Delegation of powers. Section 31. Members and officers of the Corporation to be public servants. Section 32. Removal of disqualification for membership of Parliament. Section 33. Bar of legal proceedings. Section 34. Validation of certain transactions. Section 35. Power to remove difficulties. Section 36. Power to make rules. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
